notrookied:

eventually i stop my efforts all together and just watch the movie for a bit letting her mind wander when i’m going to continue, it’s hard to pay attention while my fingers are absentmindedly inside her. the movie winds down to a slower paced scene and i get back to sucking and licking, only when it’s almost over do i pick up pace making sure she finishes after being edged so long.
